name: Amundi Index Solutions - Amundi iCPR Euro Corp Climate Paris Aligned PAB
summary: Amundi Index Solutions - Amundi iCPR Euro Corp Climate Paris Aligned PAB is likely a fund that tracks or replicates the performance of an index focused on Euro Corporate bonds that are aligned with the Paris Agreement's climate goals. The fund likely invests in a diversified portfolio of Euro-denominated corporate bonds selected based on climate-related criteria. The fund is managed by Amundi Index Solutions and is domiciled in Europe.
